features: An antiseptic, anti-fungal Shampoo and Conditioner
for minor scalp and hair infection
Very useful when you have an itchy scalp
Can also be used by people suffering from dandruff and eczema
Free of artificial perfumes and colours
description: Product Description The House of Mistry organic potenised tea tree 2 in 1 Shampoo and conditioner is antiseptic, anti-fungal Shampoo for minor scalp and hair infection. Very useful when you have an itchy scalp. It can also be used by people suffering from dandruff and eczema. Free of artificial perfumes, colours and animal derived ingredients. Ingredients Aqua, Reetha Extract (Sapindus laurifolia), Shikakai Extract (Acacia concinna), Chlorophyll (Chlorophyll), Potenised® Tea Tree oil (Melaleuca alternifolia), Nettle (Urtica dioica), Rosemary (Rosmarinus Officinalis), Arnica (Arnica montana), Calendula (Calendula officinalis). Directions [IN] Apply to hair and scalp, lather, and rinse off. See more
